EVE Health Group Limited ( (AU:EVE) ) has shared an announcement.

EVE Health Group Limited has announced a change in the director’s interest notice for Stuart Gunzburg. The change involves an off-market transfer of 20,502,645 ordinary shares, which were previously held indirectly through CBLW Pty Ltd. This transfer is part of a Deed of Settlement, and the shares will remain under voluntary escrow until June 12, 2026. This adjustment in shareholding does not involve any cash consideration and reflects a strategic realignment of interests within the company’s leadership.

data.title: Liquidity Services Reports Strong Q4 2025 Results
data.description:
Liquidity Services ( (LQDT) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Liquidity Services presented to its investors.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Liquidity Services is a global leader in e-commerce marketplaces and software solutions, specializing in the circular economy by facilitating the sale of surplus assets. The company operates across various sectors, including industrial, retail, and government, providing a platform for buyers and sellers to connect efficiently.

In its latest earnings report for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025, Liquidity Services announced a significant increase in gross merchandise volume (GMV) and revenue, driven by market share expansion and operational leverage. The company surpassed an annual GMV milestone of $1.5 billion and reported a record number of auction participants.

Key financial highlights for the fourth quarter include a 12% increase in GMV to $404.5 million and a 10% rise in revenue to $118.1 million. The company also reported a 23% increase in GAAP net income to $7.8 million and a 28% rise in non-GAAP adjusted EBITDA to $18.5 million. Liquidity Services’ strategic initiatives, such as expanding its marketplace capabilities and integrating new payment solutions, have contributed to its robust performance.

For the fiscal year 2025, Liquidity Services achieved a 15% increase in GMV to $1.57 billion and a 31% rise in revenue to $476.7 million. The company also experienced a 41% increase in GAAP net income to $28.1 million. The board approved a $15 million increase in share repurchase authorization, reflecting confidence in the company’s growth trajectory.

Looking ahead, Liquidity Services is optimistic about further scaling its marketplace platform and deepening client relationships. The company is focused on organic growth initiatives and acquisitions to maintain its leadership in the circular economy, with expectations of continued profitability and market expansion.

data.title: Intuit Inc. Reports Strong Q1 Results and Growth
data.description:
Intuit Inc. ( (INTU) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Intuit Inc. presented to its investors.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Intuit Inc., a leading global financial technology company, provides innovative solutions through products like TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, serving consumers, small businesses, and accountants worldwide.

In its latest earnings report for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, Intuit Inc. announced a robust financial performance, with significant growth across its business segments, driven by its AI-driven expert platform strategy. The company reported an 18% increase in total revenue, reaching $3.9 billion, and reiterated its full-year guidance, reflecting confidence in sustained growth.

Key financial highlights include a 21% growth in both Global Business Solutions Online Ecosystem and Consumer revenues. The company’s GAAP operating income surged by 97% to $534 million, while non-GAAP operating income rose by 32% to $1.3 billion. Additionally, GAAP diluted earnings per share increased by 127% to $1.59, with non-GAAP diluted earnings per share growing 34% to $3.34.

Intuit’s strategic focus on AI and data-driven innovations has propelled its QuickBooks Online Accounting and Credit Karma revenues, which grew by 25% and 27%, respectively. The company also reported a strong cash and investments balance of $3.7 billion and continued its shareholder return initiatives with significant stock repurchases and a 15% increase in quarterly dividends.

Looking ahead, Intuit remains optimistic about its growth trajectory, expecting double-digit revenue growth and margin expansion for fiscal 2026. The company anticipates revenue between $20.997 billion and $21.186 billion, with continued growth in its key business segments, underscoring its commitment to leveraging technology to drive prosperity for its customers.

data.title: Warner Music Group Reports Record Quarterly Revenue
data.description:
Warner Music Group Corp. ( (WMG) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Warner Music Group Corp. presented to its investors.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Warner Music Group Corp. is a leading global music entertainment company involved in recorded music and music publishing, known for its extensive catalog and iconic labels such as Atlantic, Elektra, and Warner Records.

Warner Music Group Corp. recently reported its financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year ending September 30, 2025, highlighting record quarterly revenue driven by strong growth in recorded music and music publishing.

The company’s quarterly revenue reached an all-time high with a 15% increase, supported by double-digit growth in recorded music and music publishing. Digital revenue rose by 8%, while net income more than doubled to $109 million compared to the previous year. However, cash provided by operating activities decreased by 24% in the quarter. For the full year, total revenue increased by 4%, but net income declined by 23% to $370 million, reflecting challenges such as restructuring costs and impairment charges.

Warner Music Group’s strategic focus on digital expansion and cost efficiency is evident, with plans to accelerate growth in 2026. The company anticipates margin improvements through cost savings and aims to leverage opportunities in AI to enhance music value.

Looking ahead, Warner Music Group remains optimistic about sustained profitable growth, driven by favorable music industry trends and strategic investments aimed at expanding opportunities for artists and songwriters while enhancing shareholder value.

data.title: Northern Minerals Seeks Court Order to Defer AGM Amid Share Ownership Review
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Northern Minerals Limited ( (AU:NTU) ) has provided an announcement.

Northern Minerals Limited has sought a court order to defer its 2025 Annual General Meeting due to ongoing considerations regarding the beneficial ownership of its shares. The company has referred potential breaches of foreign investment laws to the Foreign Investment Division of the Department of Treasury, as it prepares for detailed funding negotiations for its Browns Range project. The decision to seek a deferral is part of Northern Minerals’ commitment to transparency and compliance with regulatory requirements, ensuring that no breaches have occurred. The outcome of this process could impact the company’s operations and its engagement with stakeholders, as it awaits the regulator’s review.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NTU) stock is a Buy with a A$0.07 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Northern Minerals Limited stock, see the AU:NTU Stock Forecast page.

More about Northern Minerals Limited

Northern Minerals Limited is an Australian company focused on the heavy rare earths industry. The company is primarily involved in the development of the Browns Range project, which is a significant source of rare earth elements. Northern Minerals is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) and is committed to complying with all relevant rules and regulations, including those related to foreign investment and share ownership.

Average Trading Volume: 38,014,503
